original_test.body: Ares TextGrid live smoke after funding check. Reply YES if received. Reply STOP to opt out.
original_test.status: failed - Blocked by Textgrid Content Filter

interpretation: The phone number was correct. The original message was accepted initially but failed provider-side content filtering after the route returned queued. A shorter retry to the same number delivered and Martin confirmed receipt. Future live smoke must poll TextGrid status or consume callbacks before claiming delivery.
